DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY MAN TANG--MANDARIN INTERPRETER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-08-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YU, DAN XIAO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HAIGANG GROUP INC. D.B.A. CA TECHNOLOGY UNIVERSITY TONG, FRANK $1,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $120.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,320.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
